audit_items.proof_trace: Line 78 of AuctionBidder.bid() directly sets forceApprove to `s_auction.getAssetOutAmount(assetIn, amount, block.timestamp)`, so the approved amount is the return value of getAssetOutAmount by identity. In the same transaction, BaseAuction.bid() computes assetOutAmount using the same price storage, same auctionStart, and same block.timestamp, yielding an identical result; the only behavioral difference (withValidation=true vs false) only controls reverts, not the returned price value. When amount > availableBalance, bid() reverts before safeTransferFrom executes, so no approval mismatch causes harm.
